name: promptenhance
description: AI Prompt Context Optimizer - Auto-enhance developer prompts with codebase context

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/mcp-server && npm run build -w packages/cli
scripts.clean: npm run clean:dist && npm run clean:modules
scripts.verify:structure: node -e "console.log('Checking for .js files in src/...'); const exec = require('child_process').execSync; try { exec('find packages/*/src -name \"*.js\"'); console.log('Found .js files in src/ - this is wrong!'); process.exit(1); } catch(e) { console.log(' No .js files in src/ - structure is clean!'); }"
scripts.verify:build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const paths = ['packages/core/dist/index.js', 'packages/mcp-server/dist/index.js', 'packages/cli/dist/index.js']; const missing = paths.filter(p => !fs.existsSync(p)); if (missing.length) { console.log(' Missing build files:', missing); process.exit(1); } console.log(' All build files exist');"
